problem id: b76fd053
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(7) OR NOT SHR(1)

examples:
  00010001 -> 11110111
  01110001 -> 11000111
  11111100 -> 10000001
  10111011 -> 10100011
  01001011 -> 11011010
  00011101 -> 11110001
  01110111 -> 11000100
  01101010 -> 11001010
  00100111 -> 11101100

query: 00110000
predicted answer: 11100111
